title: Uninstalled Knowledge 🧠
excerpt: Completely redesigned uninstall feedback with richer diagnostics, automatic detection, improved privacy transparency, and a better overall experience.
body:
Understanding why users uninstall Friends Remover helps us build a better extension for everyone. This update completely redesigns our uninstall experience with richer diagnostics, automatic detection, and a much smoother feedback process.

We've expanded the uninstall page with more detailed feedback options, making it easier to tell us why you're uninstalling. Additional diagnostic information is now included with feedback reports to help us identify issues more accurately, including the user's country, platform, browser, extension version, Roblox detection, FPS, Rocaptcha count, and other relevant technical details.

This update does NOT collect your IP address or home address. We only collect your country, along with non-personal diagnostic information that helps us investigate bugs, understand trends, and improve the extension.

We've also fixed moderation issues and refreshed the uninstall experience with brand new options to make providing feedback faster, easier, and more useful. Every uninstall report helps shape future updates. Thank you to everyone who takes a moment to share their experience.

added.moreInfo: Users can now leave a one-way reaction describing their overall experience before uninstalling the extension.
Added the user's country to uninstall logs for improved diagnostics. This does not include your IP address or home address.
Uninstall logs now include the user's operating system platform.
Browser name and version are now automatically included with uninstall reports.
The extension version is now detected directly from the uninstall URL instead of being hardcoded.
The uninstall page now detects the Roblox user directly from the URL when available.
Added an FPS field to help identify performance-related issues experienced before uninstalling.
Uninstall logs now include how many Rocaptchas were presented to the user.

fixed.moreInfo: Fixed an issue where moderation stopped working after updating our worker service, allowing some inappropriate submissions to bypass filtering.

improved.moreInfo: The uninstall experience has been rebuilt with a cleaner interface, more feedback options, improved diagnostics, better usability, and a smoother overall flow.
